locations.waterbody: Great Hollow Lake at Wolfe Park
Great Hollow Lake at Wolfe Park

Pequonnock River, Open
Permit required for non-residents to park in Trumbull Town parks. Please
call 203-452-5060 to make an appt with the P&R Dept. A valid Fishing
License, Vehicle Registration, and ID are required.
